stemHtml: Which types of ATC messages may be sent via datalink?

options.a: Taxi clearances, in-flight flight-level-change clearances, and take-off clearances.
options.b: Pre-departure clearances, landing clearances, and oceanic clearances.
options.c: Pre-departure clearances, ATIS, and oceanic clearances.
options.d: Pre-departure clearances, taxi clearances, take-off clearances, and landing clearances.
